description_long: This is a two-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a visually striking plaid upholstery in shades of blue, beige, and gray. The sofa features broad, rectangular armrests that are the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform and modern profile. The seat and backrest are divided into two distinct, equally sized cushions, all of which appear to be firmly attached and covered in the same patterned fabric. The upholstery has a woven texture, giving the surface a slightly rough, tactile appearance. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs or underframe, suggesting a sturdy and grounded construction. This piece would be suitable for urban public spaces such as waiting areas, lobbies, or outdoor covered seating zones.
description: A boxy, two-seater sofa with blue and beige plaid upholstery, broad rectangular armrests, and a solid base with no visible legs. The seat and backrest are divided into two attached cushions, all covered in textured woven fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two attached seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the full plaid pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rectangular armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous plaid upholstery and the solid, uninterrupted back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with clear visibility of the sofa's boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached seat cushions and two attached back cushions, all uniform in size and aligned side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, with straight profiles and fully upholstered in the same plaid fabric.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a solid, continuous block extending to the floor, giving a grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest divided into two equal segments, each with an attached cushion and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Plaid pattern in blue, beige, and gray with a woven, textured fabric surface and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
